J-Junior Health Insurance

Protect your loved ones with a plan that covers hospitalization, outpatient care, dental, and optical services. Access a countrywide network of providers and apply fully online in minutes.

Start Application Get a Quote
5 flexible plans Coverage up to UGX 150,000,000 Countrywide provider network
Application Process

Apply in 4 Simple Steps

From parent details to payment, the journey is straightforward and fully guided online.

1

Your Details

Add the parent or guardian details, contact information, address, and next of kin.

2

Children & Dependants

Enter the child details, then add any dependants under an individual or family setup.

3

Cover & Health Review

Share any previous cover, answer the health questions, and choose the plan that fits best.

4

Confirm & Pay

Sign, choose how you want to pay, and receive your confirmation once payment is complete.

Care for children, with payment choices that feel manageable.

Built Around Child Care

Start with inpatient cover, then add outpatient, dental, and optical if needed.

Clear Plan Choices

Pick from five plans with visible annual limits, so it is easy to match cover to your budget.

Pay Now or Use IPF

Spread the premium into installments with IPF when a one-off payment feels too heavy.

Simple Digital Journey

Get a quote, fill the form, and pay, all online with no back and forth.

Comprehensive Medical Coverage

Hospitalization, surgeries, and specialist consultations covered.

Fully Digital Journey

Apply entirely online - no branch visits or paper forms.

Family Coverage

Cover yourself, spouse, and children under one plan.

Quick Support & Claims

Dedicated health team for fast claims and assistance.

Get a Quote
Policy Coverage

What's Covered in Your Plan

More Info - Download Brochure

Comprehensive health insurance coverage for you and your family.

HospitalizationInpatient admission, surgery, ICU, and related treatment costs.
Outpatient CareDoctor visits, tests, medication, and follow-up treatment.
Maternity BenefitsEssential maternity services within plan limits and terms.
Dental CareConsultations, fillings, extractions, and dental prescriptions.
Optical CareEye tests, frames, and prescription lenses within limits.
Emergency ServicesAmbulance support and emergency care as covered by plan.
Specialist ConsultationsAccess to specialist reviews and treatment recommendations.
Preventive CareScreening and preventive health checks for ongoing wellness.
Pharmacy BenefitsPrescribed medication support according to plan benefits.
Exclusions

What's Not Covered

These services are not covered under the policy.

Cosmetic ProceduresUnless due to accidental injury.
Alternative TreatmentsHerbal medicine, acupuncture, chiropractic care.
Hazardous ActivitiesInjuries from extreme or hazardous activities.
Fertility ServicesTreatments, family planning, and related services.
Weight Loss TreatmentsObesity-related programs and treatments.
Intentional Self-HarmOr substance abuse and medical non-compliance.

For a comprehensive list of exclusions, refer to the policy document provided upon enrollment.

Pricing

Build a J-Junior Quote

Need help comparing plans?

Choose a plan, add the benefits you need, and see a real-time premium estimate.

01 Choose your plan

Compare plan limits, key benefits, and annual per-child rates before you choose.

02 Add-ons
Optional benefits
  • Outpatient: consultations, tests, medication, and follow-up care - up to UGX 1,500,000/member on this plan.
  • Dental: consultations, fillings, extractions, X-rays/prescriptions - up to UGX 150,000/member.
  • Optical: eye tests, frames, and prescription lenses - up to UGX 150,000/member.
Select outpatient first to unlock dental and optical. Add-on premiums apply to each insured member.

Inpatient & last expense always included. Enable outpatient first to unlock dental & optical.

03 Add members
Who is being quoted
  • Individual: quote cover for one child / member under this selection.
  • Family: increase the member count to include every child or dependant you want insured.
  • Per member pricing: inpatient, last expense, and selected add-ons are multiplied by total insured members.
Before applying, keep guardian NIN/contact details, child birth certificate or NIN, address, and medical information ready.
Members
Annual Premium UGX 408,036 Covers 1 person
Coverage Limits per member
Inpatient UGX 15,000,000
Last expense UGX 1,500,000
Outpatient UGX 1,500,000
Dental UGX 150,000
Optical UGX 150,000

Now pay in monthly installments starting from UGX 49,000/mo.

Flexible Payments

Pay Your Premium in Installments

How It Works

Pay your annual premium in monthly instalments through Insurance Premium Finance (IPF) with Cairo Bank. Choose a 6 or 9 month plan - your full cover starts immediately.

Monthly Payment Options

Duration Interest Monthly Payment*

*Indicative amounts only. Subject to approval by Cairo Bank. Processing fee of 3% applies.

J-Junior plan details

Compare the main plan limits and premium for one child aged 1 month to 17 years.

Use this as a quick guide. Inpatient is included on every plan, dental and optical require outpatient, and your live quote still updates with your actual selections, levy, and stamp duty.

Who Can Apply

Who Can Apply for J-Junior

Ugandan residents - citizens and legal residents

Individuals and families seeking comprehensive health coverage

People with valid ID and contact information

Children and dependents included under family plans

Coverage for pre-existing, chronic, and congenital conditions is available subject to full disclosure and applicable waiting periods.

Start Application
Before You Apply

Keep These Ready

A few key details will help you complete the application faster.

1
Guardian Details

Keep the parent or guardian's NIN, phone number, email address, and next-of-kin details close by.

Guardian NIN Phone Number Email Address
2
Child Identification

Have each child's birth certificate number or NIN ready, together with the basic details you will enter for them.

Birth Certificate Child NIN Date of Birth
3
Address & Dependant Information

You may need village, district, county, sub-county, and parish details, plus dependant information if you are applying as a family.

Village District Dependant Details
4
Cover & Health Information

Be ready to share any previous cover, declare medical conditions, choose your plan, and decide whether you will pay now or use IPF.

Previous Cover Medical History Plan Choice
After You Apply

Enrollment & Policy Documents

What happens after your J-Junior application is submitted and approved.

Application Review

1

Application checked - Applications are reviewed within 3 working days of submission.

2

Approval & payment - Once approved and payment is confirmed, your cover is activated.

3

Welcome notification - You receive a confirmation SMS/email with your policy details.

You Will Receive

Membership Card

Digital and/or physical card for identification at providers.

Policy Document

Full terms, conditions, limits, and waiting periods for your plan.

Welcome Letter

A welcome note confirming your enrollment, activation, and next steps for using the cover.

Provider Network List

Countrywide list of hospitals, clinics, and specialists you can access.

Claims Process

Simple and Guided Claims Experience

Know what to do, what to submit, and how your child’s claim moves to settlement.

How Claims Work

4 guided steps
1
Report

Notify us as soon as possible.

2
Submit

Share reports, receipts, and forms.

3
Assessment

Our team reviews and verifies your claim.

4
Settlement

Approved claims are processed and paid.

Keep these ready

Your medical card Medical reports and receipts Prescription documents Pre-authorization letter
Important Timelines

Waiting Periods

Be aware of these important timelines before using certain benefits.

General Illness

30 days from policy start

Pre-existing & Chronic Conditions

1 year from policy start

Cancer Treatment

2 years from policy start

Congenital & Inherited Conditions

1 year from policy start

Waiting periods begin from your policy effective date. After waiting periods are satisfied, covered conditions are fully eligible for benefits.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before starting your application.

How long does the application take?+
Around 5-10 minutes if your documents are ready. The process is fully online with step-by-step guidance - no branch visits required.
Is KYC mandatory?+
Yes, KYC verification is required for policy approval. It ensures correct policy ownership, prevents fraud, and is mandatory for claims processing.
Can I insure only specific assets?+
Yes, you can choose exactly which benefits to cover. Jubilee J-Care lets you customize your health coverage based on your needs and budget.
When does coverage start?+
Coverage begins after successful payment and policy approval. You will receive your policy documents confirming your active coverage.
Can I update my policy later?+
Yes, your policy can be updated to reflect changes in your business - such as new assets, increased coverage limits, or changes in business scope.
How are claims processed?+
Submit your documents and proof of loss, our team verifies and assesses the claim, and settlement is made promptly in line with your policy terms.
